mapper.select:
SELECT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX, A.LOCKER_PRE_NAME, A.LOCKER_PRE_TYPE, A.START_DATE, A.END_DATE, A.ADD_DATE, A.ADD_ID, A.MOD_DATE, A.MOD_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER B WHERE B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS LOCKER_COUNT, A.APPLY_START_DATE, A.APPLY_START_TIME, A.APPLY_END_DATE, A.APPLY_END_TIME, A.DELETE_YN FROM LOCKER_PRE A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND A.LOCKER_PRE_NAME LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX desc

${pagingTop} SELECT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX, A.LOCKER_PRE_NAME, A.LOCKER_PRE_TYPE , A.START_DATE, A.END_DATE, A.ADD_DATE, A.ADD_ID, A.MOD_DATE, A.MOD_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER B WHERE B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS LOCKER_COUNT, A.APPLY_START_DATE, A.APPLY_START_TIME, A.APPLY_END_DATE, A.APPLY_END_TIME, A.DELETE_YN, CASE WHEN A.APPLY_START_DATE || ' ' || A.APPLY_START_TIME <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') and A.APPLY_END_DATE || ' ' || A.APPLY_END_TIME >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') THEN '1' END AS STATE FROM LOCKER_PRE A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.APPLY_START_DATE DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_PRE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND LOCKER_PRE_NAME LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY LOCKER_PRE_IDX

SELECT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX, A.LOCKER_PRE_NAME, A.LOCKER_PRE_TYPE, A.ASSIGN_START_DATE, A.ASSIGN_END_DATE, A.START_DATE, A.END_DATE, A.ADD_DATE, A.ADD_ID, A.MOD_DATE, A.MOD_ID, A.IMAGE_FILE_NAME, A.REAL_FILE_NAME, A.IMAGE_FILE_SIZE, A.IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION, A.APPLY_START_DATE, A.APPLY_START_TIME, A.APPLY_END_DATE, A.APPLY_END_TIME, A.APPLY_BACKUP_COUNT, A.DELETE_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER B WHERE B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS LOCKER_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ B WHERE B.HOMEPAGE_ID = A.HOMEPAGE_ID AND B.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX AND B.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS APPLY_COUNT FROM LOCKER_PRE A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N'
SELECT NVL(MAX(locker_pre_idx),0)+1 FROM LOCKER_PRE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE LOCKER_PRE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
UPDATE LOCKER SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
UPDATE LOCKER_REQ SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(LOCKER_PRE_IDX),0) AS LOCKER_PRE_IDX FROM LOCKER_PRE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN != 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE LOCKER_PRE SET IMAGE_FILE_NAME = '', REAL_FILE_NAME = '', IMAGE_FILE_SIZE = '', IMAGE_FILE_EXTENSION = '' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
